pageDescription: Optimize your system for maximum gaming performance
categoryMemoryDesc: Free up RAM for your game
optSvcWsearchDesc: Stops the indexing service that uses CPU and disk
optSvcSpoolerDesc: Stops the print service if you have no printer connected
optSvcDiagtrackDesc: Stops telemetry and diagnostic tracking services
optProcBrowsersDesc: Kill Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and other browsers
optProcChatDesc: Kill Discord, Slack, Teams, and other chat apps
optProcUpdatersDesc: Kill software update agents running in the background
optProcCustomDesc: Kill processes you specify by name
optMemStandbyDesc: Purge cached RAM to free memory for your game
optSysPowerPlanDesc: Switch to the maximum performance power profile
optSysPreventSleepDesc: Keep the display on and prevent the system from sleeping
optSysGameBarDesc: Turn off the Xbox Game Bar overlay and background recording
optSysFseOptDesc: Prevent Windows from applying DWM composition to fullscreen games
optSysTransparencyDesc: Turn off window transparency to reduce GPU compositing overhead
optNetFlushDnsDesc: Clear the DNS resolver cache for fresh lookups
optNetNagleDesc: Reduce network latency by disabling TCP packet batching
warningProcesses: Killed processes cannot be automatically restarted when Game Mode is deactivated.
noOptimizationsSelected: Select at least one optimization to activate Game Mode
configLockedWhileActive: Deactivate Game Mode to change settings
autoDetectDesc: Automatically activate Game Mode when a game is launched
autoDeactivateDesc: Restore system settings when the game exits
customGameProcessesDesc: Add executable names of games not in the built-in list
